siteUrl.description: Base URL of your Jira Cloud site, e.g. https://your-domain.atlassian.net

assigneeIdentifierType.description: How to identify the assignee: Jira accountId (preferred) or email (will be resolved to accountId via /rest/api/3/user/search)

assignee.description: The assignee identifier. Account ID if assigneeIdentifierType=accountId, or email if assigneeIdentifierType=email

jql.description: Optional JQL to use instead of building one from assignee. If provided, it takes precedence.

maxResultsPerPage.description: Page size for Jira search (1-100). The connector paginates until all issues are fetched.

fields.description: List of fields to return for each issue. If empty or omitted, Jira defaults are returned.

expand.description: List of entities to expand in the response (e.g., renderedFields, names, schema).

includeSubtasks.description: If false, subtasks will be excluded from results.

statuses.description: Optional list of statuses to filter by, e.g., ["To Do", "In Progress"].

projects.description: Optional list of project keys to filter by, e.g., ["ENG", "OPS"].

sinceUpdated.description: Optional ISO date/time string to filter issues updated on/after this date (e.g., 2024-01-01 or 2024-01-01 15:30).

orderBy.description: ORDER BY clause for JQL, e.g., "updated DESC" or "created ASC".
